decisions.decision: TypeScript throughout — all source files use .ts/.tsx.
decisions.rationale: Seeded locked decision from stack guidance.

decisions.decision: Next.js 14 App Router. All page and layout files live under app/. Client-interactive components are marked 'use client'.
decisions.rationale: Seeded locked decision from stack guidance. App Router is confirmed. HistoryTable and AppHeader are pure client components (no async server data), making them fully compatible with Vitest + jsdom.

decisions.decision: Vitest + React Testing Library (@testing-library/react) + jsdom as the test environment.
decisions.rationale: AC-004 explicitly names Vitest. React Testing Library is the standard companion for component smoke tests. jsdom allows DOM assertions in a Node environment. Components must be 'use client' to be mountable in jsdom (no async server component APIs used). This supersedes any Jest default that ships with Next.js.
